SHORT NAME: SUD_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: SUD_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims (derived) 

FILE(S): LT header 
OT header 

VALUES: 0 = Neither billing provider nor servicing provider(s) on claim are substance use disorders (SUD) 
providers 
1 = Both SUD billing provider and servicing provider(s) on claim 
2 = Only SUD billing provider on claim 
3 = Only SUD servicing provider(s) on
